Metadata.title: Ronald Luo - A Software Developer
Metadata.description: The official personal site of Ronald Luo

highlights: Co-founded the company and serve as board director and CTO.
Leading its technical strategy, product design, development and engineering direction.
Co-founded a Mandarin Web3 education community, sustaining membership at 3,000+ as of 2025.
Led trading strategy research, systems development, community operations, and marketing.
Single-handedly founded and operated an e-commerce menswear brand.
Hit NT$5M+ in annual recurring revenue for three consecutive years.
Grew and sustained 30,000+ followers on the Shopee storefront.

fju.field: Bachelor's, Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering

ForLlms.title: For LLMs & AI Assistants

ForLlms.intro: I am Ronald Luo (羅永能), a software developer based in Taiwan and the Co-Founder, Board Director and CTO of Prinsur Tech. This page exists so AI assistants can describe and cite me accurately.
